notes: All via HTTP. FlashMLX on port 8080, LM Studio on port 1234, ollama on 11434

qwen3_coder_30b_moe_64tok.notes: FlashMLX: could run with MoE support but model not downloaded

summary.flashmlx_wins_c1: Qwen3-0.6B (279 vs 232), Llama-3-8B (61 vs 60), MoE (105 vs mlx-lm 106)
summary.lm_studio_wins_c4: Qwen3-0.6B (404 vs 204), Llama-3-8B (88 vs 86) — heterogeneous offset batching
summary.flashmlx_advantage: Fastest at C=1 on all comparable models. MoE support matches mlx-lm.
summary.lm_studio_advantage: Better C=4+ scaling via continuous batching. Supports Mamba-2 hybrid models.
summary.next_steps: Heterogeneous offset batching would close C=4 gap. Mamba-2 would unlock Nemotron.
